glue.crawler.recrawlpolicy.RecrawlBehavi.Docs: Specifies whether to crawl the entire dataset again or to crawl only folders that were added since the last crawler run.  A value of `CRAWL_EVERYTHING` specifies crawling the entire dataset again.  A value of `CRAWL_NEW_FOLDERS_ONLY` specifies crawling only folders that were added since the last crawler run.  A value of `CRAWL_EVENT_MODE` specifies crawling only the changes identified by Amazon S3 events.
